title: Claude Code plugin marketplace manifest (.claude-plugin/marketplace.json)
description: Hand-curated schema for the Claude Code marketplace manifest. A marketplace manifest registers one or more plugins under a marketplace name so users can install them via /plugin install <plugin>@<marketplace>. Bug prevented: v0.7.1 bug was that the repo only had .claude-plugin/plugin.json (per-plugin manifest) but lacked .claude-plugin/marketplace.json (this file), which caused /plugin marketplace add <user>/<repo> to register the marketplace name correctly but /plugin install <plugin>@<marketplace> to fail with 'Unknown command' for the plugin's own slash commands. The required-files CI step covers presence; this schema covers structure.

name.description: Marketplace identifier. Used as the suffix in /plugin install <plugin>@<marketplace>. Kebab-case lowercase.

owner.description: Marketplace owner metadata. Must be an object with at least name; optional url.

plugins.description: List of plugins offered by this marketplace. Each entry must declare name, source, version, and description.

name.description: Plugin name. Must match the name field in the plugin's own .claude-plugin/plugin.json.

source.description: Path or URL where the plugin is located. './' for plugins co-located with the marketplace manifest.

version.description: Plugin version. Should match the version in the plugin's own manifest.
